module.name: src
module.purpose: Rust workspace root for flat Marix package modules, pipe send/on_receive contracts, client receive callbacks, interactive CLI streaming, and core run logging.

childModules.name: cli
childModules.purpose: CLI binary crate package using a persistent interactive prompt loop, pipe client send boundary, receive-handler callback, and streaming stdout output.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared message, session, structure, pipe send/on_receive contract, and configured model backend names.

childModules.name: config
childModules.purpose: Configuration library crate package with flat source files.

childModules.name: core
childModules.purpose: Core pipe server binary crate package that logs each run, preprocesses UserMessage input, and routes it through a configured model backend boundary.
